title: Croatian Citrus Pork Cutlets
description: A tangy and savory dish featuring Croatian pork cutlets, marinated in citrus and herbs.
instructions: Season the pork cutlets with salt and black pepper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano.
Add the pork cutlets to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Remove the pork cutlets from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the preheated skillet and sear the pork cutlets for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the pork cutlets to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve immediately, garnished with lemon wedges and fresh oregano if desired.
